heading: Campaigns built to clear the algorithm, not just look nice.
sub: Trailer edits, promos, and music-sync content for film releases, artists, and independent brands — built for organic reach, not just good looks.

items.title: Home Along Da Riles: Da Reunion
items.desc: Trailer-style promotional edit built for maximum For You Page delivery ahead of release.

items.title: Midnight Girls
items.desc: Pre-release teaser edit combining key dialogue moments with audio-sync cuts for shareability.

items.title: That's So True — Gracie Abrams Edit
items.desc: Client-commissioned music promo edit syncing Filipino film moments to a trending Gracie Abrams track — my top-performing music promotion by views and likes.

items.title: The Chosen — "Judas" Sound Edit Series
items.desc: Client-commissioned two-part edit series syncing key scenes from The Chosen to a trending TikTok sound — full intake-to-delivery workflow from creative brief to final approval.
